3.description: get snow-avalanche polygons that intersect the Narvik municipality geometry (reduced national layer)

4.description: find buildings that intersect avalanche polygons

args.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, ST_AsEWKT(omrade) AS ewkt, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune

LIMIT 1;

1.description: find Narvik municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get buildings in Narvik with point geometry

4.description: reduce avalanche polygons to Narvik municipality extent

5.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced avalanche polygons

6.description: collapse to one row per building (deduplicate)

LIMIT 1;
